metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product experiences for the Audio Streaming Platform domain, covering listener growth, creator growth, advertising, and platform foundations.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each experience carries only experience-specific flows. Each flow step lists the bricks and external systems used inside that experience.

capabilities.name: Discover the Right Audio for the Moment
capabilities.description: Help listeners quickly find something relevant to play across music, podcasts, and audiobooks.

flows.title: Discover the Right Audio for the Moment
flows.description: From open app to confident content choice.

dependencies.name: Home Personalization & Feed
dependencies.description: The personalized home feed that assembles recommendations, recirculation modules, and context-aware entry points.
dependencies.how: Uses listener context to present relevant choices immediately.

dependencies.name: Recommendations & Mixes
dependencies.description: Personalized recommendations, mixes, radios, and taste-shaping suggestions across formats.
dependencies.how: Suggests the next best listening option.

dependencies.name: Search & Library Retrieval
dependencies.description: Search and retrieval across tracks, artists, shows, episodes, audiobooks, playlists, and saved library items.
dependencies.how: Supports directed intent when the listener knows what they want.

capabilities.name: Listen Seamlessly Across Contexts
capabilities.description: Turn discovery into a durable listening habit with reliable playback, saved state, and Premium value.
outcomes: Higher Premium conversion and gross retention

flows.title: Listen Seamlessly Across Contexts
flows.description: From first play into repeat habit.

dependencies.name: Playback & Queue
dependencies.description: Streaming playback, queue management, device handoff, session continuity, and consumption telemetry.
dependencies.how: Ensures the session is smooth enough to become habitual.

dependencies.name: Library, Likes & Collections
dependencies.description: Saved content, playlists, follows, likes, recents, and other durable listener state.
dependencies.how: Creates durable listener memory and recirculation.

dependencies.name: Subscription & Plan Experience
dependencies.description: Plan selection, upsell, household management, trials, entitlements, and plan lifecycle changes.
dependencies.how: Converts habit strength into monetized plan adoption.

capabilities.name: Launch and Grow a Release
capabilities.description: Help artist teams move from release preparation into measurable fan activation and growth.

flows.title: Launch and Grow a Release
flows.description: From release prep to fan activation and insight.

dependencies.name: Artist Profile & Presence
dependencies.description: Profile configuration, artist identity, merch and link surfaces, and owned creator presence on Spotify.
dependencies.how: Makes the artist presence launch-ready.

dependencies.name: Release Operations
dependencies.description: Release readiness, metadata checks, pitching, launch-state orchestration, and release calendars.
dependencies.how: Gets the release into a launchable state.

dependencies.name: Fan Activation & Campaigns
dependencies.description: Release campaigns such as Marquee-style promotions, showcase placements, and high-intent fan activation.
dependencies.how: Turns launch moments into listener action.

dependencies.name: Audience Analytics for Music
dependencies.description: Artist and team analytics for audience growth, release performance, geography, sources, and fan cohorts.
dependencies.how: Shows whether the campaign actually grew fandom.

capabilities.name: Publish and Monetize a Show
capabilities.description: Help creators publish consistently, grow audience, and monetize through ads, subscriptions, and platform-native engagement.

flows.title: Publish and Monetize a Show
flows.description: From publish to audience growth and earnings.

dependencies.name: Podcast & Video Publishing
dependencies.description: Show, episode, and video publishing workflows with episode state, distribution, and quality controls.
dependencies.how: Gets new episodes live and policy-compliant.

dependencies.name: Audience Growth & Fan Interaction
dependencies.description: Comments, clips, follows, prompts, and recirculation tools that help creators grow their audience inside Spotify.
dependencies.how: Builds retention and fan interaction.

dependencies.name: Creator Audience Analytics
dependencies.description: Audience funnel, conversion, plays, and monetization analytics for podcasters, video creators, and publishers.
dependencies.how: Shows what content and channels are actually working.

dependencies.name: Creator Monetization
dependencies.description: Creator-side monetization across subscriptions, ad participation, Premium video revenue, and payout eligibility.
dependencies.how: Converts audience engagement into earnings streams.

capabilities.name: Run Outcome-Driven Audio Advertising
capabilities.description: Help brands plan, launch, and measure Spotify campaigns with enough confidence to keep spending.

flows.title: Run Outcome-Driven Audio Advertising
flows.description: From brief to measured campaign outcome.

dependencies.name: Ad Audience Segmentation
dependencies.description: Audience and context segmentation for advertisers and creator campaign use cases.
dependencies.how: Finds the right logged-in audiences and contexts.

dependencies.name: Campaign Booking & Delivery
dependencies.description: Campaign trafficking, inventory allocation, pacing, delivery, and creative serving across Spotify ad surfaces.
dependencies.how: Turns booked demand into actual campaign delivery.

dependencies.name: Measurement & Attribution
dependencies.description: Reach, frequency, lift, conversion, and partner measurement for advertiser outcomes.
dependencies.how: Shows whether the campaign delivered value.

dependencies.name: Billing & Revenue Operations
dependencies.description: Subscription billing, advertiser invoicing, creator settlements, credits, and core revenue ledger operations.
dependencies.how: Closes the revenue and invoicing loop.

externalSystemsThisCapabilityDependsOn.name: Third-party measurement partners
externalSystemsThisCapabilityDependsOn.description: External lift and attribution tools used by large advertisers.

capabilities.name: Operate the Shared Audio Platform
capabilities.description: Provide the identity, rights, catalog, trust, and intelligence core that lets all other experiences move safely and quickly.
outcomes: Higher platform reliability and change velocity
Lower rights, trust, and monetization error cost

flows.title: Operate the Shared Audio Platform
flows.description: From source-of-truth control into reusable platform leverage.

dependencies.name: Identity & Accounts
dependencies.description: Account creation, authentication, profile identity, family and team structures, and entitlement ownership.
dependencies.how: Provides secure identity and ownership models.

dependencies.name: Catalog & Metadata Graph
dependencies.description: Canonical graph for tracks, artists, albums, episodes, shows, audiobooks, rights entities, and content relationships.
dependencies.how: Provides one authoritative content graph.

dependencies.name: Rights & Licensing Operations
dependencies.description: Rights ingestion, territory availability, royalty logic, and licensing operations across music, podcasts, and audiobooks.
dependencies.how: Controls what can be offered, where, and under which payout rules.

dependencies.name: Trust, Safety & Policy
dependencies.description: Content policy enforcement, account safety, advertiser brand safety, and creator moderation controls.
dependencies.how: Applies policy and safety controls to every surface.

dependencies.name: Platform Intelligence & Experimentation
dependencies.description: Experimentation, event processing, feature stores, analytics products, and decision intelligence used across the platform.
dependencies.how: Lets teams change the platform with measurable feedback.

externalSystemsThisCapabilityDependsOn.name: Rights-holder and payment ecosystems
externalSystemsThisCapabilityDependsOn.description: External licensors, distributors, and financial service providers used by the shared platform.
